name: Adaptive Learning
snippet:
Adaptive learning is a technique to use data-driven instruction to adjust and tailor learning experiences to meet the individual needs of each student.
Learn what adaptive learning is, how it works, and how to create adaptive learning scenarios. Explore the benefits, best practices, and resources for adaptive learning in higher education.

name: Adaptive learning
snippet:
Adaptive learning , also known as adaptive teaching, is an educational method which uses computer algorithms as well as artificial intelligence
Adaptive learning, or intelligent tutoring, emerged from the artificial intelligence movement and gained traction in the 1970s. It was widely believed that computers would eventually develop human-like adaptability in learning.

name: What Is Adaptive Learning?
snippet:
25 Nov 2025 — Adaptive learning is an educational approach that uses artificial intelligence (AI) and data analytics to adjust lessons and assessments to each ...
Adaptive learning algorithms respond to your input in real time, creating a personalized learning pathway tailored to your needs. You can improve the effectiveness of your online learning by engaging with lessons that adapt to your current skill level.

name: (PDF) Adaptive Learning Technologies
snippet: Adaptive learning refers to technologies that dynamically adjust to the level or type of course content based on an individual's abilities or skill attainment.

name: Adaptive learning technology explained: Benefits
snippet:
2 Dec 2025 — Adaptive learning technology is transforming e-Learning by tailoring content, pace, and assessments to each learner's needs.
Adaptive learning technology automatically adjusts the learning experience based on the learner's knowledge level, pace, and performance. The content, feedback, and order of modules change accordingly, so that each participant receives a personalized and relevant learning path.

name: Adaptive Learning Technology
snippet: Adaptive learning technology uses data-driven instruction to adjust and personalize educational content based on each learner's needs.

name: Adaptive Learning Technologies for Personalized Education
snippet: Adaptive learning technologies are transforming modern education by offering personalized, real-time learning experiences that adjust to the individual needs ...

name: Adaptive Learning: What is It, What are its Benefits and How
snippet: Technology-based adaptive learning systems or e-learning systems can provide students with immediate assistance, resources specific to their learning needs, and relevant feedback that students may need. Adaptive learning typically occurs on a web-based platform.
